chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4286 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No. 17665/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 5 3. For order on Misc. No. 17666/2025 (Exemption/A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.08.2025 Ch. Muhammad Ibtisam Khalil Advocate for the Petitioner.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for the Petitioner after arguing at some length submits that he will be satisfied if directions are given to the SHO P.S. Mominabad to use his best efforts to solve the case for which the complainant Muhammad Ismail has registered FIR No. 355 of 2025. The SHO Police station Mominabad is directed to use all his best efforts to locate the person; to cooperate with the victim family and to conduct the investigation in accordance with the law and under the provisions of Police Rules. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
